calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title And Transfer Property To Trust
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Moallem for and with Trustee Craig Cohen.

The Court stated that there is an issue with property being purchased after the date and asked counsel if she could cite a case. Ms. Moallem stated that there is nothing in Ukkestad to say that you cannot. The Court pointed out that Ukkestad said all real property as of now goes into the trust and that this is a step beyond. Ms. Moallem stated that there is no temporal statement in Ukkestad and read the language to the Court. The Court stated that it does not interpret Ukkestad to apply to after acquired property. Ms. Moallem stated that she has been successful with this in other counties, that they do not believe that the Trustor knew that the property was not in the trust, that he lived abroad and that when he came back to the states he was ill and subsequently passed. The Court took the Petition to Determine Title and Transfer Property to Trust under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)
